description: Full-screen image lightbox overlay with keyboard navigation (arrow keys, Escape), previous/next controls, counter display, and optional delete button.

examples.title: Standalone lightbox
examples.code: <TmLightbox IsOpen="@showLightbox" ImageUrl="@currentUrl" ImageAlt="Photo" IsFirst="@isFirst" IsLast="@isLast" CurrentIndex="@index" TotalCount="@total" OnClose="@CloseLightbox" OnPrev="@GoToPrev" OnNext="@GoToNext" />

examples.title: Lightbox with delete
examples.code: <TmLightbox IsOpen="true" ImageUrl="/img/photo.jpg" ImageAlt="Vacation" IsFirst="false" IsLast="false" CurrentIndex="2" TotalCount="10" CanDelete="true" OnClose="@Close" OnPrev="@Prev" OnNext="@Next" OnDelete="@Delete" />
